title: Char1ie's Vault
description: Turns the Ender Chest into a small Vault!
body:
**

Requires [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) + [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) OR [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads)** ![CHARLIE'S VAULT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86c6f1c73cecb67e5c7b42b08b2a4b5d67700531.png) **

Vault is a texture pack utilizing EMF+ETF on fabric or Optifine on forge that turns the Ender Chest into a small Vault!** ![The vault](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3b675c0ced079d5c7a81d4b70a7e20efefa0656.png) **

KNOWN ISSUES/BAD THINGS** _

these are all things I cannot fix no matter how much i really want to_

Opening animation turns the hatch above and behind the vault, this is because the Ender Chest's opening/closing animation is hard-coded into the game and can't be changed with EMF/Optifine

The Ender Chest particles are still there and cannot be changed without changing all entire generic particles, which would NOT be good.

The Ender Chest's model can still be seen in the inventory/GUI, much like the animation, it's because that model is hard-coded into the game and can't be changed with EMF/Optifine **

IF YOU KNOW HOW TO FIX ANY OF THESE PLEASE LET ME KNOW IN THE COMMENTS OF CURSEFORGE** _

if you'd like to use assets from this pack, or anything else I made, let me know about it and please credit the pack somewhere somewhat obvious, like a description or credits area._ **

Made by TeamChar1ie (me)** **

Check out my other projects [Here!](https://modrinth.com/user/TChar1ie)**
